description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply angular, delta-shaped wing configuration and a streamlined fuselage. The wings are highly swept with multiple vertical stabilizers along the trailing edge, giving it a stealthy, advanced appearance. The nose is pointed and features a forward-placed, enclosed cockpit with a tinted canopy. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, all visibly extended. The engine appears to be a single, large jet integrated into the rear fuselage, with prominent exhaust detailing. The exterior is primarily a matte light gray with black accents, and the overall design suggests a high-performance, possibly military or experimental aircraft.
description: A futuristic, angular airplane with swept delta wings, multiple vertical stabilizers, and a forward cockpit. It features a single rear jet engine and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the large jet exhaust, multiple vertical stabilizers, and the wide, angular wingspan.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sharply swept wings, extended landing gear, and pointed nose.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the symmetry of the wing and stabilizer arrangement.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the angular wing structure, landing gear, and engine intake details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, highly swept delta configuration with multiple vertical stabilizers along the trailing edge and pronounced anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with multiple vertical stabilizers and no conventional horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main units under the wings and a single nose gear, all extended and likely retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy integrated into the nose section.
